title: Thelypteris angustipes
taxonomy: Thelypteris angustipes is classified within the family Thelypteridaceae, which is a part of the order Polypodiales. This species belongs to the genus Thelypteris, a group of ferns commonly known as marsh ferns. The family Thelypteridaceae is a group of ferns that are primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. Thelypteris angustipes is native to Central and South America and is often found growing in wet environments. The classification of Thelypteris angustipes is further supported by its morphological characteristics, such as its narrow leaves and distinctive venation pattern.
